meta.title: slideforge in 30 seconds
meta.description: A short, text-only example Deck: the shape of a minimal pitch.
meta.author: slideforge examples

beats.heading: Slides and video shouldn't be two separate jobs
The problem

items: Slidev decks and HyperFrames videos are authored separately today
Content drifts out of sync between the two
Nobody wants to write the same pitch twice

beats.notes: Pause here -- let the problem land before moving on.

blocks.content: An agent builds a Deck once. slideforge compiles it to a live Slidev deck and a rendered HyperFrames video.
